p_named.text: Lily and the cat  became friends and they continued to play together in the park.
Lily and the cat  played together for a while, but soon it was time for Lily to go home. She said goodbye to the cat and promised to come back and play with it again soon.

Lily and the cat  played together for a while, but then Lily realized that she had left the cat alone. She went to look for it and found the cat under the couch with the toy car. Lily was happy again and they played together for the rest of the day.

Lily and the cat  went to the barn together. They found some hay and started to play a game. The cat was happy to have a friend to play with. Lily was glad to have a friend to play with. 

The End.
Lily and the cat  played together every day. They would play hide and seek and even have a picnic in the park. Lily was happy to have such a good friend.
